error_signature: unable to get content to expand when sidebar collapses
title: Content not expanding with collapsed sidebar
symptom: The content does not adjust its width when the sidebar is collapsed, leading to layout issues.
applies_when: Content is bound to sidebar width
not_this_if: Content expands correctly in other scenarios
root_cause: The content's width is likely fixed or improperly bound to the sidebar's state, preventing it from dynamically adjusting when the sidebar collapses.
fix_steps: Bind the margin of the content to the sidebar's state using the formula: '0 0 0' + if(sidebar expansion = true, menuWidth.expanded+'px', menuWidth.collapsed+'px')
Unbind any fixed width settings on the content elements to allow for dynamic resizing.
agent_instruction: Adjust the margin binding for the content based on the sidebar's state and remove fixed width constraints.
